name: bath-house
summary: A public or private bath-house. A central heated pool, smaller plunge basins, benches along the wall for attendants to oil and scrape, a brazier for warming oils. Tile underfoot, steam rising.

accent.purpose: wet tiled edge around the pool

primary_palette.note: classic bath — central pool, flanking benches
formal bath — hot pool + cold plunge, columned
therapeutic bath — attendants working at massage tables

story_prompts: midday bathers — nobles reclining, attendants oiling, deals being made
empty morning — pool steaming, lone attendant lighting braziers
assassination site — a figure floating face-down, screaming bather
private session — the whole house rented, two rivals negotiating in the pool

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: soft humid light (0.4) — lamps flicker in steam

anti_patterns: the pool is a water-fill, not a prop — it's sunk into the floor
pillars mark the edge of the pool chamber — never block the pool
changing area and bathing area should feel separate — use an alcove
